heading: (intro)
raw: Directed by Mike Nichols. Written Ernest Lehman.

heading: George

heading: George

heading: George

heading: George

heading: Dialogue
raw: George: Let me tell you a secret, baby — there are easier things in this world, if you, uh… happen to be teaching at a university, there are easier things than being married to the daughter of the president of that university. There are easier things in this world.
